why_this_drawing: 발견도면(1.dwg) != 검증도면. A30 heavily exercises the SAME machinery the 11 repairs + 7 LEX laws were built for: 265 HATCH (pattern-scale idempotence fix b939f8d + LEX-0008 orphan-assoc + LEX-0009 angle-branch + LEX-0011 assoc-cardinality + LEX-0012 loop-rotation), 4005 SPLINE (the Bezier re-decomposition residue class), 783 DIMENSION. Modelspace out_of_class=0; block-def out_of_class = WIPEOUT 33 + POLYLINE 1.
probe_config: bounded transfer probe: --per-kind-limit 25 --batch-size 25 --with-records --skip-identity (fast signal on the key classes before the multi-hour full run)

predictions.hatch_transfer: sampled HATCHes roundtrip CLEAN — pattern-scale fix means no 40x drift; LEX quotients fold notation/angle/loop differences. Predict per-hatch diff0 with 0 novel residue classes (i.e. no residue kind not already seen/legislated on 1.dwg).
predictions.spline_transfer: sampled SPLINEs show the KNOWN Bezier re-decomposition residue (curve-equal, control-net notation differs) — a small per-spline residual, NOT a regression and NOT a new class.
predictions.out_of_class_defer: WIPEOUT + POLYLINE defer HONESTLY (no certified create op) and appear in deferred.json — not silently dropped, not fake-passed.
predictions.overall_transfer_signal: interior diff fraction on the sampled CERTIFIED entities > 0.95 if the laws generalize. The load-bearing claim is QUALITATIVE: the residue COMPOSITION on A30 is drawn from the same classes legislated on 1.dwg (splines + out-of-class defers), with NO novel unexplained residue class.

fail_investigation_triggers: A30 HATCHes show pattern-scale drift (40x or any systematic scale error) => the b939f8d fix is 1.dwg-overfit, not general.
A novel residue class appears that was NOT seen/legislated on 1.dwg => the 7 LEX laws are incomplete for the domain.
out_of_class entities are silently counted as applied (FM8) instead of deferred.
discipline: FAIL is investigated, never renamed. Any prereg miss is dissected to a named class before the number is accepted.
